emails.subject: risk overview
emails.body: risk overview Zach, Can you get together Friday morning to go over the basics of what we do? I will try to find some old class materials for you to review as well. I will let you know when and where tomorrow. Thanks, Kam

emails.subject: RE: risk overview
emails.body: RE: risk overview Kam, No problem. Just let me know when and where you want to meet. Thanks for setting this up. I really appreciate it and look forward to talking with you about what I will be doing. Thanks, Zac To: McCarroll, Zachary

emails.subject: RE: risk overview
emails.body: Zach, Let's try for tomorrow morning around 9:30. Stop by desk and we'll run through the basics. KK To: Keiser, Kam

emails.subject: RE: risk overview
emails.body: Can we postpone this to this afternoon? I am in the middle of a project. I will call you soon. KK To: Keiser, Kam
